name: Phase Tracking
about: Track progress for a development phase

labels: phase, tracking
assignees: ''
---

## Phase Overview

**Phase Number**: [e.g., Phase 5]
**Phase Name**: [e.g., Analytics & Reporting]
**Status**: 📝 Not Started / 🚧 In Progress / 👀 In Review / ✅ Complete
**Target Completion**: [Date]

## Objectives

Describe the main goals and objectives of this phase.

## Tasks

### Backend
- [ ] Task 1
- [ ] Task 2
- [ ] Task 3

### Frontend
- [ ] Task 1
- [ ] Task 2
- [ ] Task 3

### Testing
- [ ] Unit tests
- [ ] Integration tests
- [ ] E2E tests

### Documentation
- [ ] API documentation
- [ ] User documentation
- [ ] Code comments

## Dependencies

List any dependencies on other phases or external factors:
- Depends on: Phase X completion
- Requires: External library Y
- Waiting for: Design approval

## Pull Requests

- [ ] PR #XXX - Feature 1
- [ ] PR #XXX - Feature 2

## Testing Checklist

- [ ] All tests passing
- [ ] Manual testing completed
- [ ] Edge cases covered
- [ ] Performance tested
- [ ] Security reviewed

## Notes

Add any additional notes, challenges, or decisions made during this phase.
